definition_hi: ऐसे वाक्यों का समूह जो एक मुख्य विचार को विकसित करे, paragraph कहलाता है।
title: Writing, Composition & Creative English System ()

categories.name: (लेखन, रचना एवं सृजनात्मक अंग्रेज़ी प्रणाली)
categories.intro:
Teacher Introduction
बच्चों, अब तक हमने:
grammar
spoken English
translation intelligence
vocabulary
idioms
competitive English
समझ लिया।
अब हम English के उस भाग में प्रवेश करेंगे जहाँ: language “answer देने” से आगे बढ़कर:
writing
presentation
communication
expression
creativity
का माध्यम बनती है।

categories.name: Main Goal of Part 37
categories.intro:
Student:
proper English writing कर सके
paragraph लिख सके
formal writing समझ सके
creative expression कर सके
structured composition लिख सके
exam-oriented writing कर सके

categories.name: Included Systems
categories.intro:
1. Paragraph Writing System
2. Essay Writing System
3. Letter Writing System
4. Email Writing System
5. Notice Writing System
6. Report Writing System
7. Article Writing System
8. Creative Writing System
9. Formal vs Informal Writing System
10. Writing Improvement Drill System

categories.name: 1. Paragraph Writing System
categories.intro: (अनुच्छेद लेखन प्रणाली)

categories.name: What is a Paragraph?
categories.intro:
English Definition
A paragraph is a group of sentences that develops one main idea.

categories.name: Structure of Paragraph
categories.intro:
1. Topic Sentence
2. Supporting Sentences
3. Concluding Sentence

categories.name: Example Topic
categories.intro: Importance of Discipline

categories.name: Paragraph
categories.intro: Discipline is very important in life. It helps a person stay focused and organized. A disciplined student studies regularly and respects time. Discipline also develops confidence and responsibility. Without discipline, success becomes difficult. Therefore, discipline is the key to success.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro:
Good paragraph:
one idea
clear flow
proper ending
रखता है।

categories.name: 2. Essay Writing System
categories.intro: (निबंध लेखन प्रणाली)

categories.name: Essay Structure
categories.intro:
1. Introduction
2. Body
3. Conclusion

categories.name: Example Topic
categories.intro: Importance of English

categories.name: Introduction
categories.intro: English is one of the most important languages in the world. It is used in education, business, science, and communication.

categories.name: Body
categories.intro: English helps people communicate internationally. It also provides better career opportunities. Most modern knowledge and technology are available in English.

categories.name: Conclusion
categories.intro: Therefore, learning English is essential in the modern world.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Essay: paragraph से बड़ा और detailed होता है।

categories.name: 3. Letter Writing System
categories.intro: (पत्र लेखन प्रणाली)

categories.name: Types of Letters
categories.intro:
1. Formal Letter
2. Informal Letter

categories.name: Formal Letter
categories.intro:
To
The Principal
ABC School
Subject: Leave Application
Respected Sir,
I am suffering from fever. Therefore, I request you to grant me leave for two days.
Thank you.
Yours obediently,
Ram

categories.name: Informal Letter
categories.intro:
Dear Friend,
How are you? I hope you are doing well. I miss you very much.
Your friend,
Mohan

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Formal और informal tone अलग होती है।

categories.name: 4. Email Writing System
categories.intro: (ईमेल लेखन प्रणाली)

categories.name: Structure
categories.intro:
To
Subject
Greeting
Main Message
Closing

categories.name: Example
categories.intro:
Subject: Meeting Confirmation
Dear Sir,
I am writing to confirm tomorrow’s meeting. I will arrive on time.
Thank you.
Regards,
Rahul

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Email: modern formal communication का important part है।

categories.name: 5. Notice Writing System
categories.intro: (सूचना लेखन प्रणाली)

categories.name: What is Notice?
categories.intro: Short official information.

categories.name: Example
categories.intro:
NOTICE
All students are informed that the school will remain closed tomorrow due to heavy rain.
Principal

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro:
Notice:
short
clear
direct
होता है।

categories.name: 6. Report Writing System
categories.intro: (प्रतिवेदन लेखन प्रणाली)

categories.name: Example Topic
categories.intro: Annual Sports Day

categories.name: Report
categories.intro: Our school celebrated Annual Sports Day on Monday. Many students participated in different games and competitions. The principal encouraged the students to maintain sportsmanship. The program ended successfully.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Report: real event का factual description होता है।

categories.name: 7. Article Writing System
categories.intro: (लेख लेखन प्रणाली)

categories.name: Example Topic
categories.intro: Importance of Reading Books

categories.name: Article
categories.intro: Reading books improves knowledge and imagination. It develops vocabulary and thinking ability. Books also help us understand different cultures and ideas. Therefore, reading should become a daily habit.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Article: information + opinion दोनों देता है।

categories.name: 8. Creative Writing System
categories.intro: (सृजनात्मक लेखन प्रणाली)

categories.name: Story Writing
categories.intro: Once upon a time, there was a poor farmer who worked very hard. One day, he found a bag full of gold coins…

categories.name: Dialogue Writing
categories.intro:
Ram: Where are you going?
Mohan: I am going to the market.

categories.name: Imaginative Writing
categories.intro: If I became a scientist, I would invent machines to help poor farmers.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Creative writing: imagination develop करती है।

categories.name: 9. Formal vs Informal Writing System
categories.intro: (औपचारिक एवं अनौपचारिक लेखन प्रणाली)

categories.name: InformalFormal
categories.intro:
ThanksThank you
ByeGoodbye
Can’tCannot
Help meKindly assist me

categories.name: Example
categories.intro:
Informal: I can’t come today.
Formal: I am unable to attend today.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Writing style: situation के अनुसार बदलती है।

categories.name: 10. Writing Improvement Drill System
categories.intro: (लेखन सुधार अभ्यास प्रणाली)

categories.name: Weak Sentence
categories.intro: I am very happy.

categories.name: Better Sentence
categories.intro: I am extremely delighted.

categories.name: Weak Sentence
categories.intro: He is a good boy.

categories.name: Better Sentence
categories.intro: He is a disciplined and hardworking student.

categories.name: Sentence Expansion Drill
categories.intro:
Basic: The boy runs.
Expanded: The young boy runs quickly toward the playground every morning.

categories.name: Error Correction Drill
categories.intro:
❌ He go to school daily.
✅ He goes to school daily.

categories.name: ❌ I am having a car.
categories.intro: ✅ I have a car.

categories.name: Final Writing Formula
categories.intro:
Grammar
+
Vocabulary
+
Structure
+
Clarity
+
Creativity
+
Natural Expression
Effective English Writing

categories.name: Final Goal of Part 37
categories.intro:
Student:
paragraph लिख सके
essay लिख सके
formal/informal writing समझ सके
letter/email/report लिख सके
creative writing कर सके
structured composition बना सके
writing mistakes सुधार सके
expressive English writing mastery विकसित कर सके।
